title: Paw Patrol Dogs and Armor
description: A Datapack+Resource Pack that turns tame wolves into dogs, and adds the Paw Patrol if a dog is named accordingly
body:
This Datapack Adds the Paw Patrol characters, with powers, to Minecraft!

Without the datapack, the resource pack will:

1) Convert the new wolves into dogs when tamed
2) Overhaul the wolf armor to be a lot prettier

With the datapack, when naming a dog one of the following, each dog gives nearby players an ability!

- Chase gives Speed
- Rubble gives Haste
- Marshall gives Fire Resistance
- Skye gives Slow Falling
- Zuma gives Water Breathing
- Rocky gives a special item Magnet effect
- Everest gives Resistance
- Tracker gives Night Vision

A dog named one of the above will change dog type, collar, acquire the correct armor color, and get a permanent regeneration effect.
